Always know they're safe.
Free to download.

A.1 — Hero Trust Strip
A — Hero

She's on her own in a city you've never been to. Bond has a live agent watching every step.

Bond stages a live agent before every solo trip — watching every rideshare, every transit leg, every unfamiliar city. Your family gets automatic arrival alerts. The agent is already on it before they leave.

  • A live agent staged before every trip — watching their route, not on call
  • Your whole family gets automatic alerts when they arrive
  • Auto-escalation if they go off-route or stop responding
  • Your family sees their live location — every city, every time zone

Trusted by families with travelers in 40+ countries

C — Focused Service

Track Me On The Go

An agent is watching. Your family will know the moment they arrive safe.

Bond stages a trained security agent before every solo trip — watching in real time across any city or time zone. Your family gets automatic alerts when they arrive. If anything goes wrong, the agent acts before anyone starts to worry.

  • Agent staged before every trip, watching real-time in any city or country
  • Works on rideshares, transit, on foot, everywhere
  • Auto-escalation if they go off-route or stop responding
  • Your whole family sees their live location in real time
B — Feature Cards

Bond is more than just Track Me On The Go.

Real-time location is just the start. Bond keeps your whole family connected — live location, arrival alerts, and a live agent your traveler can reach any time.

Agent watching every trip

A trained Bond agent is staged before every solo trip — watching every rideshare, every route, every unfamiliar city. Worldwide. Already watching.

Automatic family alerts

Everyone at home is notified the moment your traveler arrives at their destination — hotel, airport, meeting point. The agent already confirmed it.

Family-wide live location

See your traveler on a shared family map — every route, every city, every arrival — without anyone sending a single text.

D — Arrival Alerts

Family arrival alerts

Your family will know the moment they arrive safe.

Bond monitors every trip from departure to arrival and automatically notifies your whole family when they land or check in. If something goes wrong, a live agent steps in — before anyone starts to worry.

  • Journey monitoring across any distance
  • Whole family notified automatically — no text needed
  • Auto-escalation if they don't arrive on time
  • GPS and location photo sent to first responders if needed
E — Live Agent

Live security agents

A real person. One tap away. No matter where they land.

Bond's trained security agents are available 24/7 in every major city — for your traveler, or for any family member who needs help back home. One tap and a real person takes charge.

  • Trained and certified agents available worldwide
  • Your traveler can connect anywhere, any time
  • Coordinates local police, fire, and EMS on their behalf
  • Available via video, audio, or text
F — Hook CTA

Most families find out something went wrong
after the trip was over.

Bond keeps your family connected in real time — live location, automatic arrival alerts, and a live agent one tap away wherever your traveler lands.

G — Social Proof

Trusted by families of travelers everywhere

Loved by
families
everywhere.
